summary: Large hsd_3AA7 matching/decomp PR focused on sysdolphin baselib memory-card command/state handling. It replaces the hsd_803AAA48 stub with C, restructures many hsd_3AA7.c functions around CardState/CardCmd-like typed data, updates hsd_3AA7.h prototypes and CardState layout, and adjusts two callers to use CardState instead of the older hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t placeholder. The bot report records 3 new matches and 15 unmatched-item improvements in main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3AA7.

key_files.role: Main decomp/matching body; adds typed command/status structs, includes hsd_3B2B.h, rewrites fn_803AA790, implements hsd_803AAA48, and changes many hsd_3AA7 functions.

what_changed.text: Replaced the hsd_803AAA48 placeholder with a large C implementation handling card operation dispatch, async CARD calls, status transitions, command queue advancement, and callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: /// #hsd_803AAA48 replaced by s32 hsd_803AAA48(void) with switch over command type and CARD APIs

what_changed.text: Improved fn_803AA790 by indexing CardQueueEntry directly, simplifying callback invocation, and expressing sub-state dispatch with switch cases 0, 1/2, 3, and default.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_803AA790 rewrite

what_changed.text: Introduced local typed structures CardOpStatus, CardCmd, HsdCmdEntry, and CMD_QUEUE to represent status and command queue data instead of repeated raw offset expressions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: CardOpStatus, CardCmd, HsdCmdEntry, CMD_QUEUE additions

what_changed.text: Expanded CardState in hsd_3AA7.h with CARDFileInfo, CARDStat, file index arrays, icon fields, digest, and related offsets; removed the narrower hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t placeholder struct.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 3433-3468

what_changed.text: Updated header prototypes from UNK or placeholder-pointer forms toward CardState-based signatures where the diff shows recovered signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 3470-3509

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a placeholder partial struct only covers early fields but callsites and function bodies reveal later fields, broaden the real struct and update signatures/callers rather than preserving the placeholder type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 3433-3468: hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t removed and CardState expanded
diff_excerpt: lbcardnew.c and hsd_3A94.c use CardState casts

decomp_lessons.lesson: For command queues stored inside a larger buffer, temporary typed entry structs plus an accessor macro can make queue indexing and field stores clearer than repeated byte-offset arithmetic.

raw_diff lines 3367-3388: CMD_QUEUE/hsd_803B2550_inline replaces base + 0x1210 raw stores

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace narrow placeholder structs with recovered subsystem structs when bodies and callsites prove the fields
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2512 removed hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t, expanded CardState with CARDFileInfo/CARDStat and later card metadata fields, and updated hsd_803AC3E0/hsd_803AC558 callers to use CardState. Candidate lesson: prefer recovered typed structs and truthful prototypes over maintaining a temporary partial placeholder once enough field evidence exists.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 3433-3493
diff_excerpt: lbcardnew.c and hsd_3A94.c caller updates

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed command entries to replace byte-offset queue manipulation
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2512 introduced HsdCmdEntry/CMD_QUEUE and CardQueueEntry indexing to express command queue reads and writes in hsd_3AA7. Candidate tactic: when a queue stride and fields are stable, a temporary typed entry can improve matching source readability compared with repeated base+offset stores.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: CardQueueEntry indexing and CMD_QUEUE macro
raw_diff lines 3367-3388

rejection_notes: Do not treat the PAD_STACK(24) change as an accepted general tactic; the loaded evidence only shows the edit and a bot score improvement, not a narrow objdiff justification.
Do not infer human reviewer intent or requested changes; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not claim all hsd_3AA7 functions in the PR matched; the bot report lists only 3 new matches and 15 improvements.
Do not promote CardState field semantics beyond names/offsets visible in the diff; many field names remain xNN-style.
